title: Knit and purl: the foundation stitches
sources: Weldon's Practical Knitting (1880s onward), opening pages of any early volume — the knit and purl introductions are near-identical across the series
Mary Thomas's Knitting Book (1938), §The Two Fundamental Stitches
notes: Pair the two foundation stitches in one tutorial — they don't need separate entries. Cover both English-style (yarn-throwing) and Continental-style (yarn-picking) for each. No chart needed; this is a written-prose stitch tutorial. The body links forward to stocking stitch and garter stitch as the two stitches the reader will meet on their first project.
